context_for_next_testing_agent: Processed tab feature fully tested. Inbox now has 4 tabs: All (17 active docs), Accounting (0 docs), Sales (17 docs), Processed (4 terminal docs). The filtering works correctly - All/Accounting/Sales tabs use queue_view=true to hide terminal docs, while Processed tab uses queue_view=false and client-side isTerminal() filter to show only completed/exported/posted/archived/auto_filed docs. Document click in Processed tab navigates to detail page correctly. Sales page has 6 tabs (Pipeline Demo, My Queue, Triage, Sales Orders, Rep Performance, Inventory Ledger). Insights page shows charts correctly.
